task_completion.description: Open the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image in ImageJ
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ application is open with the 'Fluorescent Cells' image displayed.

task_completion.description: Isolate or select the blue (DAPI) channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image window shows only the blue channel (DAPI), or the channels tool is used to display only the blue channel.

task_completion.description: Perform line profile analysis on cell nuclei
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line selection tool is drawn across a nucleus in the image, and/or a 'Plot Profile' window is open showing the intensity profile of the line.

task_completion.description: Record required measurements for at least 5 nuclei
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor is open containing columns for 'Nucleus ID', 'Peak Intensity', 'Background Intensity', 'FWHM', and 'Line Length', with data populated for at least 5 distinct nuclei.

task_completion.description: Calculate Mean and Standard Deviation of FWHM values
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary row at the bottom of the recorded data explicitly shows the calculated 'Mean' and 'Standard Deviation' (or 'Std Dev') for the FWHM column.

task_completion.description: Save the measurements to the specified CSV file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box, file manager, or terminal window showing the file saved as 'fwhm_measurements.csv' in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ GUI to perform the analysis rather than bypassing it with a script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ImageJ menus, tools, and plot windows.

integrity.description: The recorded peak intensities are realistic for the image
integrity.visual_evidence: Peak intensity values in the recorded data are within the standard 8-bit range (between 50 and 255), not arbitrary dummy numbers like 1, 2, 3.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type out a pre-generated or hallucinated CSV file without doing the work
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of drawing lines, viewing plots, and transcribing or exporting the data into the CSV.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires measuring at least 5 distinct nuclei. Peak intensity values should be between 50 and 255 (standard 8-bit range). The output file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/fwhm_measurements.csv.
